finding_results.notes: Compressed repeated protocol-vs-donor volleys and re-sequenced the negotiation so each turn introduces new leverage: legal exposure, medical/access guardrails, conditional concession, and noncooperation consequence.
Rebuilt the aftermath as in-scene fallout by adding immediate bodily destabilization and live institutional consequences (badge restriction plus legal escalation) before and during the email action.
Removed hindsight 'should have' framing and grounded the decision beat in present-tense bodily sensation and immediate action pressure.

summary: Resolved all three structural/craft findings by tightening escalation in the negotiation scene, removing moral safety-valve hindsight at the decision pivot, and replacing administrative drift in the aftermath with embodied and immediate institutional consequence.
